author: gb9t
content:
Decision locked-in 2026-05-09 (user direction):

**ABSORBED into Rookery as the row-1 grsec/PaX feature set:**

KERNEXEC, UDEREF, USERCOPY, REFCOUNT, RAP/CFI, RANDSTRUCT, AUTOSLAB, PRIVATE_KSTACKS, RANDKSTACK, MEMORY_SANITIZE, SIZE_OVERFLOW, CONSTIFY, LATENT_ENTROPY

Plus the other LSM-orthogonal features in the catalog: PAGEEXEC, NOEXEC, MPROTECT, DIRECT_CALL/DIRECT_SLS_CALL (Spectre-v2/SLS mitigation), RANDMMAP, ASLR, DELAY_FREE_ONE_PAGE, CLOSE_KERNEL, CLOSE_USERLAND.

Each feature now has a named design home in security/00-overview.md (a 21-row table mapping each feature to the Tier-2 doc + planned Tier-3 location where its implementation is specified). Cross-cutting policy (mandatory-always-on vs. secure-default-configurable vs. opt-in-sysctl) consolidates in 00-security-principles.md (issue #2) when authored.

00-overview.md Foundational Decisions table 'Hardening source' row updated: explicit list replaces the previous '…' placeholder; the locked decision is named with date.

This decision is binding for Phase C (component Tier-3 designs). Each Tier-3 doc that implements one of the listed features gains a 'Hardening' section that cites the security/00-overview.md table when the doc lands.

Knowledge pages refreshed: 00-overview, security-00-overview.
